items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the foundation day of Khalsa Panth and Baisakhi
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the foundation day of Khalsa Panth and Baisakhi This sacred day reminds us of the establishment of the Khalsa Panth by Sri Guru Gobind Singh Ji On this auspicious occasion, I extend my heartfelt greetings to the Khalsa Panth and bow to the hard work of our annadata…
